login.title: Sign In
login.intro: Join us and explore a world of possibilities! Sign in with your email or conveniently use your Google account to get started.

google.title: Google account
google.description: Sign in or register with Google account
google.body: Easily access all our features by signing in with your Google account. No need for remembering another password – just one click and you're in! You will be redirected to Google to sign in or register. We will not have access to your password.

email.title: E-mail
email.description: Use your e-mail address to sign in or register
email.body: If you don't have or don't want to use your Google account, you can sign in or register with your e-mail address. Enter your email address below and we'll send you a secure sign-in link. Just click on the link in your email to access your account – no password necessary!

username.title: Login
username.description: Sign in with username and password
username.body: If you have login and password, sign in here. To create new account using invite code, press Sign Up.

errors.failedGoogleToken: Failed to get Google Access Token

emailSentDialog.title: Check inbox
emailSentDialog.content: We've sent you an email with a link to sign in. Go to your inbox and click on the link to sign in.

cookiesDialog.title: Cookies
cookiesDialog.content: This website uses cookies to improve your experience. By using this website, you agree with our Privacy Policy.

dashboard.noDataClickLoad: No data available. Click "Load Data" to fetch.
